arts.ttl: Liverpool injury concern as Trent Alexander-Arnold limps off vs PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool have been dealt a major injury concern after Trent Alexander-Arnold was forced off the pitch during Wednesday’s Uefa Champions League clash with Paris Saint-Germain. The full-back started the round-of-16 second leg at Anfield, but didn’t finish the game after he landed awkwardly while trying to make a challenge midway through the second half. arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold suffers injury days before Liverpool’s Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold was forced off against PSG, with Liverpool facing Newcastle in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday

arts.ttl: Liverpool get instant PSG referee penalty verdict after Dominik Szoboszlai flashpoint
arts.sum: Liverpool felt they should have been awarded a penalty during the first half for a foul on Dominik Szoboszlai.

arts.ttl: Watch hilarious moment Daniel Sturridge runs for cover to avoid being soaked by Anfield sprinklers
arts.sum: Daniel Sturridge had to be on his toes to avoid a soaking from the Anfield sprinklers at half-time of Liverpool 's Champions League clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Lille, PSG Achieve What Real Madrid Couldn’t at Anfield in Champions League This Season
arts.sum: After surviving early pressure from Liverpool, Paris Saint-Germain took the lead in the 12th minute of the second leg, leveling the aggregate score at 1-1. Nuno Mendes played a pass to Ousmane Dembele, who quickly shifted the ball to Bradley Barcola on the right. arts.ttl: ‘Nobody expected that’: BBC pundit saw what Liverpool ace did to surprise entire PSG XI in first-half
arts.sum: Stephen Warnock could not believe his eyes after seeing Ibrahima Konate hit a great shot from such a far distance. arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele Matches Real Madrid Legend Cristiano Ronaldo’s Feat After Goal vs Liverpool
arts.sum: After absorbing Liverpool’s early pressure, Paris Saint-Germain struck first in the 12th minute to take a 1-0 lead in the second leg, leveling the aggregate score at 1-1. Nuno Mendes picked out Ousmane Dembele in the middle, who quickly played it wide to Bradley Barcola on the right. arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Two targets 'identified' by the Reds amid uncertainty over Virgil van Dijk's future
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keeping tabs on two highly-rated young centre-backs as potential replacements for Virgil van Dijk, who is out contract this summer.

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Liverpool-PSG, Leverkusen-Bayern
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Tuesday's Champions League action as Liverpool take on Paris Saint-Germain, Leverkusen take on Bayern and Inter take on Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Official Starting Lineups for Second Leg in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be looking to overcome a 1-0 aggregate deficit against Liverpool at Anfield, and now the starting 11 for the two sides are revealed. The home side will be looking to at least hold onto their advantage if not increase their lead.
